rationale: Agent completed intake in 10 turns (well under 14-target). Aggressive batching evident throughout: regulatory hypothesis covering all three jurisdictions at once (turn 3), combined workload+stakeholders in single beat (turn 5), presented all practice areas together (turn 7). Hypothesis-confirm pattern used correctly - stated regulatory expectation and let user correct/add. No re-asks, no single-fact drilling, skip-when-covered applied cleanly when user quickly selected practice areas.
